title: Schema-contradiction control: an undeclared top-level key
summary: A structurally valid binder plus one undeclared top-level key. This is the control: additionalProperties:false is enforced by BOTH binder-schema.json and validate_binder.py, so both must reject it. If either accepts it the dual mechanism itself has broken, which is a finding — the control proves the two-validator comparison is live.
motivation: Prove the schema-vs-validator dual actually rejects the undeclared-key case on both sides, so an agreement is real and not a both-blind pass.
bogus_extra_key: neither binder-schema.json nor validate_binder.py declares this key

work_items.title: Control item
work_items.summary: A single valid work item; the deviation is the undeclared top-level key.
